query: SELECT parcLiberada, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CASE WHEN chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND chaveJ != '' AND chaveJ != 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_chave FROM consorcios WHERE mesAno = '05/2026' GROUP BY parcLiberada ORDER BY parcLiberada;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT parcLiberada, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CASE WHEN chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND chaveJ != '' AND chaveJ != 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_chave FROM consorcios WHERE mesAno = '05/2026' GROUP BY parcLiberada ORDER BY parcLiberada;
